name: R0_promoted_text_cluster_hyp
description: Control: current promoted text-cluster screen completion (min_count=5) when YOLO empty.

name: R1_edge_phone_loose
description: Exploratory: loose edge-phone when YOLO empty (high FP; not default).

name: R2_yolo_conf005_union
description: Union base YOLO screens with YOLO11-1280 conf=0.05 (no hyp).

name: R3_yolo005_plus_hyp
description: YOLO conf0.05 union + text-cluster hyp when still empty.

name: R4_hyp_plus_edge_loose
description: Text-cluster hyp when empty; loose edge residual if still empty (exploratory).

name: R8_hyp_plus_strict_edge_phone
description: Promotable residual: text-cluster hyp when empty; strict landscape bottom-phone edge if still empty.

name: R9_strict_edge_only_if_empty
description: Strict landscape bottom-phone edge only when YOLO empty (no text-cluster hyp).
